name: Worm Queen
desc: You can Tribute Summon this card in face-up Attack Position by Tributing 1 Reptile-Type "Worm" monster. Once per turn, you can Tribute 1 Reptile-Type "Worm" monster to Special Summon 1 Reptile-Type "Worm" monster from your Deck with a Level less than or equal to the Tributed monster.<!-- Please, do not change this text to the one found in the card database under Hidden Arsenal 2 as many of them have their old text instead of the latest text. -->
